title: Jamaican Gratin
description: A unique polish dish with a resinous, glassy-jelly texture featuring allspice and binchotan-charcoal, perfect for kids and those with dairy intolerance.
instructions: Peel and slice the sweet potatoes into 1/4 inch thick rounds.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat. Add the sweet potato slices and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the cooked sweet potatoes to a baking dish and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together the allspice berries, cinnamon, ginger, and binchotan charcoal powder. Sprinkle this spice mixture evenly over the sweet potatoes.
Pour the coconut cream over the sweet potatoes and sprinkle with salt.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sweet potatoes are tender.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
Serve warm, straight from the oven.
